market_context: The market is currently experiencing mixed signals with inflation concerns persisting despite strong tech earnings. Geopolitical tensions are also contributing to volatility, leading to cautious investor sentiment across various sectors.

predictions.reasoning: Strong buying pressure observed in the last hour of trading, supported by positive economic data releases earlier today.
Continued strength in the technology sector, driven by robust AI development news and anticipated interest rate stability.
Reports of weaker-than-expected iPhone sales in key international markets are weighing on investor sentiment.
Persistent demand for AI chips and strong forward guidance from management continue to fuel bullish sentiment.
